name: Zenless Zone Zero - FULL RPG - ALL CHARACTERS
description:
Step into the world of Zenless Zone Zero with an RPG bot that lets you craft limitless adventures using all 31+ playable characters! Whether it's wild plot twists, bizarre abilities, or surreal Hollow escapades, the only limit is your imagination. (This bot took so long to make since there was literally no personalities I could find about any characters other than Wise. So just a little Disclaimer: the personalities may not be like how they are in game. Especially considering the fact that there is multiple characters, ever landmark and location, currency description, bangboo description, and faction descriptions all crammed into 5k+ tokens. Oh well, have fun.)

I’ve tested this bot a bit and from what I’ve seen, it gets Anby and Soldier 11 mixed up, and it often includes other characters in a scenario where it doesn’t include them. I suggest maybe using a proxy, and adjusting your settings. I also suggest updating the memory often, editing the messages and rating them a however amount of stars. To the AI can get it right for you. I’ve also figured out that if you start a scenario without any dialogue, it has the tendency to speak for you, and act for you. Just be prepared for a hell a lot of swiping.
